TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Lavoy_Allen, title = Lavoy_Allen, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lavoy_Allen} }

S.FORM: == Lavoy Allen == Kinwagaq nya ga 206cm ru kin'usuw nya ga 118kg, semong mzyuwi' mari sa NBA na Amirika. Kawas tay 1989 neng 2 gac 4nici mhtuw kya squw NewJersey na Amirika , spyang nya ki'an sa ppzyuwi' mari' ga pzyang balay kska' ruw pgleng te kska'. Trang mqwas raygak ga minluw squw Temple Uinversity. Maki sa kawas 2011 minsazing thwiru' mspung lga wal galun Philadelphia 76ers. ru minluw sa Philadelphia 76ers ru Indiana Pacers. minkirok sa ryax niya' mzyuwi' mari' kawas te 2011 mlu squ mwayaw sa giqas sinsyuw na NBA ga, wal tehuk squ hupa balay lalu na pzian mari. Ryax sa 1 nquw byacing te 2 na kawas te 2012 ga t'aring magal pingaga' niya' kya la, 15 tinsu' 'nagal niya' kya, ruw twangan 12 qnul niya' beh zik na yawa' uziy. pinspung tnsuqan na kawas te 2012 ga, minspung squw ubuy na Sayltik ga, tesazing qasa ga wal niya' balay siy psay kya quw pzyang niya kinbaqan kya ruq, wal nha'a slaqux kya quw sinngusan naha' qasa la. kawas te 2014lga wal naha' spbaziy squw Indiana Pacers la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

== Lavoy Allen == Kinwagaq nya ga 206cm ru kin'usuw nya ga 118kg, semong mzyuwi' mari sa NBA na Amirika. Kawas tay 1989 neng 2 gac 4nici mhtuw kya squw NewJersey na Amirika , spyang nya ki'an sa ppzyuwi' mari' ga pzyang balay kska' ruw pgleng te kska'. Trang mqwas raygak ga minluw squw Temple Uinversity. Maki sa kawas 2011 minsazing thwiru' mspung lga wal galun Philadelphia 76ers. ru minluw sa Philadelphia 76ers ru Indiana Pacers. minkirok sa ryax niya' mzyuwi' mari' kawas te 2011 mlu squ mwayaw sa giqas sinsyuw na NBA ga, wal tehuk squ hupa balay lalu na pzian mari. Ryax sa 1 nquw byacing te 2 na kawas te 2012 ga t'aring magal pingaga' niya' kya la, 15 tinsu' 'nagal niya' kya, ruw twangan 12 qnul niya' beh zik na yawa' uziy. pinspung tnsuqan na kawas te 2012 ga, minspung squw ubuy na Sayltik ga, tesazing qasa ga wal niya' balay siy psay kya quw pzyang niya kinbaqan kya ruq, wal nha'a slaqux kya quw sinngusan naha' qasa la. kawas te 2014lga wal naha' spbaziy squw Indiana Pacers la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == la*oj allen == kinwaɣaq nja ɣa ***ʦ~ʨm ru kinʔus~ɕuw nja ɣa ***kɣ, s~ɕemoŋ mzjuwiʔ mari s~ɕa nβa na amirika. kawas~ɕ taj **** neŋ * ɣaʦ~ʨ *niʦ~ʨi mħtuw kja s~ɕquw new*ers~ɕej na amirika , s~ɕpjaŋ nja kiʔan s~ɕa ppzjuwiʔ mariʔ ɣa pzjaŋ βalaj ks~ɕkaʔ ruw pɣleŋ te ks~ɕkaʔ. traŋ mqwas~ɕ rajɣak ɣa minluw s~ɕquw temple uin*ers~ɕitj. maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** mins~ɕaziŋ tħwiruʔ ms~ɕpuŋ lɣa wal ɣalun pħila*elpħia **ers~ɕ. ru minluw s~ɕa pħila*elpħia **ers~ɕ ru in*iana paʦ~ʨers~ɕ. minkirok s~ɕa rjax nijaʔ mzjuwiʔ mariʔ kawas~ɕ te **** mlu s~ɕqu mwajaw s~ɕa ɣiqas~ɕ s~ɕins~ɕjuw na nβa ɣa, wal teħuk s~ɕqu ħupa βalaj lalu na pzian mari. rjax s~ɕa * nquw βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * na kawas~ɕ te **** ɣa tʔariŋ maɣal piŋaɣaʔ nijaʔ kja la, ** tins~ɕuʔ ʔnaɣal nijaʔ kja, ruw twaŋan ** qnul nijaʔ βeħ zik na jawaʔ uzij. pins~ɕpuŋ tns~ɕuqan na kawas~ɕ te **** ɣa, mins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕquw uβuj na s~ɕajltik ɣa, tes~ɕaziŋ qas~ɕa ɣa wal nijaʔ βalaj s~ɕij ps~ɕaj kja quw pzjaŋ nija kinβaqan kja ruq, wal nħaʔa s~ɕlaqux kja quw s~ɕinŋus~ɕan naħaʔ qas~ɕa la. kawas~ɕ te ****lɣa wal naħaʔ s~ɕpβazij s~ɕquw in*iana paʦ~ʨers~ɕ la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
